text: Standing in this space, I am struck by the blend of sterile modernity and vibrant curiosity. The glass doors and clean lines suggest meticulous order, yet just beyond them, color and text invite me to question and engage. Here, 'R + D' feels not only like a promise of technical progress but a call to philosophical reflection. I feel both small and expansive—as though on the edge of discovery, paused between the known and the yet-to-be-understood.
